title: Ransomware Isolation and Recovery
steps: ["Physically disconnect affected machines from network (pull ethernet / disable wifi)","Do NOT power off - preserve memory for forensics","Isolate the core switch uplink to contain spread","Notify IT Coordinator and district IT security","Identify last clean backup on backup-nas and verify integrity","Rebuild from clean backup after confirming attacker is out","Reset all domain passwords before reconnecting"]
notes: District cyber insurance requires notification before paying any ransom - do not pay

title: SIS Restore from Backup
steps: ["Confirm SIS is the affected system","Take SIS server offline","Restore latest verified backup from backup-nas","Validate attendance and enrollment counts against paper records","Bring SIS back online and confirm staff logins"]

title: Data Breach Notification
steps: ["Determine exactly which records and PII fields were exposed","Contact district counsel and cyber insurance immediately","Preserve logs and evidence","Draft parent/staff notification per FERPA and state deadline","Notify state education department if breach is large","Offer credit monitoring if SSN/financial data exposed"]
notes: FERPA has no fixed hour deadline but state law may require 30-45 days

title: Network Outage Recovery
steps: ["Confirm scope via get_blast_radius on the affected asset","Check firewall and core switch power and link lights","Fail over to backup internet if gateway down","Call MSP NOC if hardware failure","Switch office to paper attendance until SIS reachable"]
